headline: Assembly Biosciences Touts HSV, Hepatitis D Catalysts at BofA Conference
summary: Assembly Biosciences (NASDAQ:ASMB) Chief Medical Officer Anuj Gaggar outlined the company’s virology strategy and upcoming clinical priorities during a Bank of America-hosted discussion, emphasizing programs in herpes simplex virus, hepatitis D and transplant-related herpes viruses. headline: Veeva Commercial Summit to Feature Biopharma's AI Successes and the Path to Agentic Commercial
summary: Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) will showcase the future of agentic commercial in biopharma at Veeva Commercial Summit, May 19-20 in Boston. Leaders from argenx, Bayer, Boehringer Ingelheim, Genentech, Gilead, GSK, Merck, Novo Nordisk, Takeda, Vertex, and more will share AI successes and explore new approaches to commercial engagement.
